<<php url swap guide>>

Use str_replace to swap the old url for the new one in your string content
The code works for multiple occurrences of the same link pattern
Here is a palindrome for you: noon
Replace http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1 with http://yahoo.com/abc1 in your text
This function handles repeating strings without extra complexity
Your html anchor tags will update automatically with the new address
No dots are used in this explanation as requested
The solution is simple and effective for your needs
